screenshots.title: Dashboard
screenshots.description: Operational dashboard with payment volume, transaction health, and country revenue visibility.

screenshots.title: Organizations
screenshots.description: Global organization list showing separate tenants that share one self-hosted deployment.

screenshots.title: Provider Management
screenshots.description: Provider management with enabled card, direct debit, and wire-transfer rails in one organization.

screenshots.title: Sites
screenshots.description: Multiple sites for storefront, subscription, and B2B invoice channels with separate provider routing.

screenshots.title: Site Provider Routing
screenshots.description: Site-level provider assignment showing checkout routing priority and default provider selection.

screenshots.title: Transactions
screenshots.description: Transaction list for reviewing provider status, settlement state, site, client, and external reference.

screenshots.title: Invoice Detail
screenshots.description: Issued invoice detail with seller/client snapshots, tax breakdown, payment state, and document actions.

screenshots.title: Tax Settings
screenshots.description: Organization tax settings for seller country, OSS, VIES, rounding, and gross-price behavior.

screenshots.title: Tax Rules
screenshots.description: Generated EU VAT OSS destination rules with priorities and active rate codes.

screenshots.title: VAT OSS Report
screenshots.description: Quarterly OSS report preview with current net, VAT, and gross totals plus Austria rows.

screenshots.title: E-Invoicing Settings
screenshots.description: E-invoice settings for XRechnung, ZUGFeRD, Peppol, and PDF document generation.

screenshots.title: Customer Portal Documents
screenshots.description: Customer portal document list grouped by issuer and site for invoice and credit-note downloads.

screenshots.title: Customer Portal Invoice
screenshots.description: Customer portal invoice detail with seller/client data, VAT lines, totals, and configured e-invoice downloads.
